title: No More LAN
description: Well, as the name states, it removes the "Open To Lan" button in the pause menu.
body:
_Are you feeling like cheating and want to use the "Open To Lan" glitch?_

### **Well here's a fix:**

_This mod encourages the player to not use that glich, since this mod makes it IMPOSSIBLE!_

- Changelog:
  - Disables the "Open to LAN" button in the pause menu.

![Disabled "Open to LAN" button.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a85f65ee15c7019589bd74a378ded6e45abe768d_0.webp)
